name: testforge
description: Make local coding Agents verify better, then test and remember every Augment you build.

interface.shortDescription: A quality ratchet for local Agent competence.
interface.longDescription: Give inexpensive local coding Agents a risk model, evidence discipline, and independent reviewer, then turn every Agent capability into a test, reengineering, baseline, and regression loop that moves quality upward.
defaultPrompt: Make this local Agent verify the repository before it ships.
Find the catastrophic risks this test plan may have missed.
Test this Augment and preserve a reviewed behavioral baseline.
